creator: david.marec@proton.me
text:
Including `<sys/_types.h>` at first place in `endian.h` solve the issue.

root@llanura:~ # diff -u /usr/include/endian.h.orig /usr/include/endian.h
--- /usr/include/endian.h.orig	2023-03-19 20:21:06.799414000 +0100
+++ /usr/include/endian.h	2023-03-19 20:21:11.125166000 +0100
@@ -15,6 +15,7 @@
  * FreeBSD's sys/_endian.h is very close to the interface provided on Linux by
  * glibc's endian.h.
  */
+#include <sys/_types.h> 
 #include <sys/_endian.h>
